title: microsorum neglectum
intro: Microsorum neglectum, also known as the Java Fern, is a type of epiphytic plant belonging to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Microsorum neglectum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
